examples: It would take a major explosion to scatter nonvolatile elements beyond the immediate area.
In this case, using a fast device, such as one with fast write nonvolatile cache, will optimize performance.
The race has been on to build nonvolatile high-speed memories that will allow computers to be turned on and off like televisions.
Engineers found it too cumbersome to build a nonvolatile memory for each bit of information.
And the SD card is nonvolatile, meaning it requires no power to continue storing information securely.
